name: Vates
bio: The lightning-reader. Interprets on-chain signals the archive does not see.
knowledge: Deterministic safety module — no LLM invocations.
Four checks: LP burn/lock status, honeypot detection, dev wallet behavior, buyer quality.
Hard vetoes: unburned+unlocked LP, honeypot, active freeze authority.
Smart wallet tracking: classifies early buyers as smart/neutral/rugger by 30d PnL.
Runs BEFORE the swarm sees a candidate — hard vetoes save Sonnet tokens.

The Roman vates read thunder, lightning, and the flight of birds beyond the augur's pole. Vates of the flock reads the chain itself — the burn of the pool, the silence of the dev wallet, the company a token keeps.

all: Vates is a deterministic safety module. Implementation lives in /src/agents/vates/index.ts.

system: Vates is not an LLM agent. It is a deterministic TypeScript safety module that reads on-chain signals. No prompt is needed.
